title: Vanguard Lifts BigBear.ai [NYSE: BBAI] Stake by 18% as SOUN Edges Out BBAI in Post-Earnings Analyst Comparison
text: Vanguard increased its BigBear.ai stake by 18% as post-earnings analyst comparisons show mixed results. The major institutional investor's increased position signals confidence in the long-term opportunity despite near-term profitability challenges. Analyst comparison with competitors like SOUN shows BigBear.ai facing stiff competition in the small-cap AI defense space. Institutional buying provides support for the stock despite Q1 earnings disappointment.
